parsed.message: Cloudflare Pages production is missing FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 binding; private-video upload, publish, access-change, archive, R2 fallback, and complete storage cleanup cannot be claimed recovered. Delete remains a separate limited path that requires dry-run, typed confirmation, and real-account QA.

realTeacherAccount.note: Round334 consumes existing real-teacher-account evidence; it does not print credentials or rerun browser automation.

r2Boundary.message: Cloudflare Pages production is missing FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 binding; private-video upload, publish, access-change, archive, R2 fallback, and complete storage cleanup cannot be claimed recovered. Delete remains a separate limited path that requires dry-run, typed confirmation, and real-account QA.
r2Boundary.blocker: Cloudflare Pages production lacks or has not proven FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2; upload/change/archive and storage-backed delete cleanup remain blocked.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 列表刷新
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: Ready for a real teacher account: listing is read-only and does not require FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA writes.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 重复保存当前授权
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: Ready for a real teacher account: saving the identical current access is a no-op and does not prove storage-backed mutation recovery.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 删除 dry-run 预检
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: Ready for a real teacher account: dry-run checks course state, assigned user, segments, and cleanup plan without deleting data.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 永久删除专属课
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: Limited for a real teacher account: the UI/API safety path is present, but real deletion cleanup is not promoted while FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is missing or unproven.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 上传/发布专属课
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: 上传/发布专属课 is blocked for real production management until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is present; real teacher-account access alone does not repair storage-backed writes.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 改授权学生
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: 改授权学生 is blocked for real production management until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is present; real teacher-account access alone does not repair storage-backed writes.

realTeacherManagementActions.label: 下架专属课
realTeacherManagementActions.reason: 下架专属课 is blocked for real production management until FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is present; real teacher-account access alone does not repair storage-backed writes.

productionBlockers: FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 production binding is missing or unproven; upload/change/archive and storage-backed delete cleanup remain blocked.

acceptance.meaning: Round334 explicitly separates ready real-teacher read/no-op/dry-run actions from limited delete and blocked storage-backed actions while FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA is missing.
